DP2 Footprint Viewer (Public)

Tracts: Area: deg²

DP2 Footprint Viewer — depths are theoretical predictions based on N-visits and PSF FWHM presented in rtn-011, using the photerr LSST noise model.

This viewer was created by Tianqing Zhang and Shrihan Agarwal. The data presented herein are intended for Rubin Observatory data rights holders.
